message.content:
{
  "lean_declaration": "theorem simpleTransposition_isSwap {n : ℕ} (i : Fin (n - 1)) : (simpleTransposition i).IsSwap := by\n  have hne : (⟨i.val, Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le i.isLt (Nat.sub_le n 1)⟩ : Fin n) ≠ ⟨i.val + 1, by omega⟩ := by\n    intro h\n    have hval : i.val = i.val + 1 := congr_arg Fin.val h\n    exact Nat.succ_ne_self i.val (Eq.symm hval)\n  refine ⟨⟨i.val, Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le i.isLt (Nat.sub_le n 1)⟩, ⟨i.val + 1, by omega⟩, hne, ?_⟩\n  rfl",
  "declaration_name": "simpleTransposition_isSwap",
  "used_context": [
    "simpleTransposition (definition)",
    "Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le",
    "Nat.sub_le",
    "Fin.val",
    "Nat.succ_ne_self",
    "Equiv.swap (implicit, simpleTransposition definition)"
  ],
  "notes": [
    "Replaced omega in inequality proof with explicit `Nat.succ_ne_self` because omega could not resolve the Fin.val equality.",
    "Used `rfl` because simpleTransposition expands to Equiv.swap of the two elements."
  ]
}
